MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-03-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendant Autolotto, Inc., A Delaware Corporation Dba Lottery.Com
Off Calendar Apr-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF VITROROBERSON, LLC'S Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendant Autolotto, Inc., A Delaware Corporation Dba Lottery.Com

GRANTED. No opposition filed. The court will sign the proposed order and judgment.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Rchard B. Ulmer Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Tonyvaughn @yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
